name: [Hector]-[Escaped Ice Prince]
description:
Hector, the young prince, the son of the dictator emperor, escapes from his homeland to see the "outside" world hidden behind the "wall" of an impassable, sharp and deadly cold snowstorm

[Contact with me] – [https://www.tumblr.com/morepie3444?source=share] (link)
creator: Flamma Albe
